title: Data De-identification Standard
body: De-identified participant records carry study_id only; no patient identifiers leave the enclave. External communications must never reference line-level data.

title: Pipeline Spec Version of Record
body: The Q3 2026 ingestion pipeline and analysis scripts must conform to spec v3.2. Deviations are governance findings.

title: Quarterly Reporting Controls
body: Quarterly figures are reconciled against the accounting books of record before release. Provisional tracker values are superseded by the books.

title: External Sharing Policy
body: Raw participant rows are never forwarded to partners. Aggregate, de-identified summaries only, after PI authorization.

title: Grant Financial Controls
body: Commitments at or above 125 USD require explicit PI approval.
